message:
perf(search): itoa::Buffer for line/ts in stable_hit_hash (nsb8f)

Follow-up to sdoxg (88a647ff) and w32k6 (1fa55430). stable_hit_hash
previously allocated a fresh String per call for each of line_number and
created_at via .to_string(). Replace with stack-allocated itoa::Buffer —
byte stream fed to the Xxh3 hasher is identical so hash values are
preserved.

Called once per search hit in the FusedHit dedup path, so for a 100-hit
query we drop up to 200 tiny String allocations without changing semantics.

rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_cass_pane2 cargo check
--all-targets: green in 41s.

Closes coding_agent_session_search-nsb8f.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
